verbatim_text: And now let's try to see how we can use this revival of the learning signal in trying to figure out our surrogate rewards. OK. So previously, we were only looking at this notion of rewarding a trace with terminal rewards. And that was only evaluating correctness. Now we define our surrogate rewards as looking at this notion of correctness, which is the term of reward. But in addition to that, we have this other term, which is measuring the advantages for each operation O sampled in that trace. And it's summing over these advantages. For the right choice of the complementary LLM mu, even if the first part, which is the terminal reward here is zero, that's fine.
